message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Wrapper: full compute_ss instantiation (lines 2361 onwards) ==="
awk 'NR>=2355 && NR<=2450' "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo ""
echo "=== Wrapper: SWD signal references ==="
grep -n "swclk\|swdi\|swdo\|swdo_en\|swd" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -30

echo ""
echo "=== Wrapper: JTAG signal references ==="  
grep -n "tck\|tms\|tdi\|tdo\|trst_n\|jtag" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -30

echo ""
echo "=== Wrapper: SWD pad connections (before compute_ss instantiation) ==="
grep -n "swclk\|swdi\|swdo\|swd\|debug\|swdio\|swdclk" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -30
` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Wrapper: full compute_ss instantiation (lines 2361 onwards) ===
// Clock pad: input mode
assign clk_out = 1'b0;
assign clk_oe_n = 1'b1;
assign clk_inp_dis = 1'b0;

// Compute subsystem instantiation
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss u_core (
    .clk(clk_in),
    .reset_n(reset_n_xres_h_n),
    .tck(1'b0),
    .tms(1'b0),
    .tdi(1'b0),
    .trst_n(1'b0),
    .qspi_sck(),
    .qspi_ce_n(),
    .qspi_din(4'b0),
    .qspi_dout(),
    .qspi_douten(),
    .clk_rst_pwr_prdata(32'b0),
    .clk_rst_pwr_pready(1'b1),
    .clk_rst_pwr_pslverr(1'b0),
    .io_cfg_ss_prdata(32'b0),
    .io_cfg_ss_pready(1'b1),
    .io_cfg_ss_pslverr(1'b0),
    .gpioa_in(w_gpioa_in),
    .gpioa_out(w_gpioa_out),
    .gpioa_oe(w_gpioa_oe),
    .gpiob_in(w_gpiob_in),
    .gpiob_out(w_gpiob_out),
    .gpiob_oe(w_gpiob_oe),
    .gpioc_in(w_gpioc_in),
    .gpioc_out(w_gpioc_out),
    .gpioc_oe(w_gpioc_oe)
);

endmodule

`default_nettype wire

=== Wrapper: SWD signal references ===

=== Wrapper: JTAG signal references ===
2364:    .tck(1'b0),
2365:    .tms(1'b0),
2366:    .tdi(1'b0),
2367:    .trst_n(1'b0),

=== Wrapper: SWD pad connections (before compute_ss instantiation) ===
